sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 47:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 47:1
items.html: Through the correction of the Parsa in such a way that the bottom Hey can descend to her place, the AHP that went out and became the Beria of the degree, return to the Atzilut of the degree. (Inner Observation, Item 14)
